The [[Emmer system/Legends|Emmer system]] contained an '''asteroid belt'''. It was extensively [[Mining/Legends|mined]] using [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner]]s and [[ore hauler]]s. Thirty thousand individuals lived and worked in the belt.<ref name="E" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Elusive (adventure)|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}}
